tools.name: oj_capabilities
tools.description: Report audited Codeforces official API capabilities and unsupported operations.

tools.name: oj_health
tools.description: Return passive transport, schema, and persisted Codeforces upstream health.

tools.name: oj_search_problems
tools.description: Search official Codeforces problem metadata by id, title, or tag.

tools.name: codeforces_get_problem_metadata
tools.description: Get official metadata only. This tool does not return a problem statement or submit code.
